steps.title: Find the boundary values
steps.content:
For the inequality $y\gt7x-4$, compute $7x-4$ for the listed $x$-values:
$$7(3)-4=17$$
$$7(5)-4=31$$
$$7(8)-4=52$$

steps.title: Require strictly greater values
steps.content: The table must have $y$-values greater than $17$, $31$, and $52$ in the corresponding rows. The values $21$, $35$, and $56$ are all strictly greater.

steps.title: Choose the valid table
steps.content: Only the table with $y$-values $21$, $35$, and $56$ satisfies the inequality for every row. The answer is D.
